# Fumadocs Documentation Snapshot Notice

This project includes a curated and modified snapshot of documentation from:

- Project: Fumadocs
- Author: Fuma
- Repository: <https://github.com/fuma-nama/fumadocs>
- Website: <https://www.fumadocs.dev>
- License: MIT

The imported pages are acquired from the official site's processed Markdown
representation, then modified to add local frontmatter, attribution, and link
rewrites. The exact acquisition time, upstream commit when discoverable, source
URLs, local targets, and content hashes are recorded in `snapshot.json`.

The snapshot is provided for offline reference. It may not match the current
official documentation.
